data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of alerting a supervisor upon a failed inspection. However, the evidence only confirms that the system locks out the forklift and creates a maintenance ticket, but does not explicitly mention that an alert is sent to the supervisor. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the specific action of alerting the supervisor is not evidenced in the provided scenario.
gaps: No evidence of alerting the supervisor upon failed inspection.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
